Containers.Name: Unraid Copilot
Containers.Description: Native AI agent for monitoring and controlling Unraid.
Containers.Overview: Unraid Copilot is a zero-dependency AI assistant integrated directly into the Unraid WebUI. It uses a secure ReAct loop and a Go-based MCP daemon to interact with the Unraid GraphQL API, allowing you to monitor system health and perform management tasks via a simple chat interface.
